job_description:
At PCL Construction, Inc., part of the PCL Family of Companies (PCL), we don’t just build projects—we build opportunities, careers and communities. We are 100% employee-owned, every employee has a stake in our success, and that shared commitment drives how we work, grow and lead in the construction industry.

We’re a team of builders who care deeply about what we create and who we build it with. That includes you. We are not only investing in what’s next in construction, we are investing in what’s next for your career.

As a Estimating Data Analyst for PCL Construction, Inc. in Tempe, Arizona, you’ll have the opportunity to leverage data analytics and technology to enhance the accuracy and efficiency of our estimating processes. In this role, you will analyze large datasets, develop and refine cost estimation models, and create visual dashboards and reports that translate complex data into actionable insights for project teams and leadership. Using tools such as SQL, Excel, PowerBI, Python, and AI platforms, you will help identify trends, optimize workflows, and support data-driven decision-making across our estimating and project teams.

Why Choose PCL?

Choose a career with rewards that matter. PCL’s total rewards are designed to support your growth, well-being and future success—because when you succeed, we all do.

Our Offerings Could Include

* Employee ownership opportunities that build long-term value
* Annual discretionary performance bonuses
* 401(k) with company match
* Industry-leading medical, dental and vision benefits
* Prescription drug coverage and telemedicine services
* Life, AD&D and disability insurance
* Paid parental leave and family care support
* HSA or FSA for healthcare, dependent care and transportation
* Mental health and wellness support, including Employee Assistance Programs
* Career growth pathways, leadership development and mentorship programs
* Access to world-class training through PCL’s College of Construction and professional development courses
* Ongoing opportunities to learn new skills, explore different roles and grow your career across sectors and regions
* 
Here's how a Estimating Data Analyst for PCL Construction, Inc. within Civil West contributes to our team:

Responsibilities

* Supports estimators on preparing bids and proposals.
* Develop, maintain, and refine cost estimation models using historical data, trends, and statistical techniques.
* Create dashboards and reports to present trends and projections to leadership and owners.
* Utilize AI to optimize estimating/administrative processes.
* Assists with bid document control and documenting, organizing, and archiving all information relating to the estimate for successful transfer to the project team. 
* Develops and maintains strong relationships with all stakeholders including lead estimator, lead bid runner, subtrade partners and suppliers. 
* 
Qualifications

* Background: degree in (mathematics, statistics, computer science, data analytics, AI)
* Technical skills in some or all of the following: SQL, Excel, PowerBI, Python, Tableau, Azure (SQL server), Co-Pilot (or other AI platforms)
* Strong critical thinking skills
* Ability to analyze large data sets and translate into actional business insights
* Ability to communicate technical findings to non-technical clients
* Accuracy and attention to detail
* Ability to represent complex data in visual dashboards
* 
Your Work Has Purpose Here

PCL projects are where life happens, where communities connect, careers begin, and progress is made. Regardless of the type of project, we are building something bigger: a future that's inclusive, resilient and full of opportunity.

At PCL Construction, Inc., we are committed to creating a workplace where everyone belongs. We value the diverse experiences, identities and perspectives our employees bring. Employment decisions are based on merit, potential and the drive to make a difference, regardless of race, gender, age, ability or background.

We know everyone's needs are different, if you require accommodation during the application process, please contact careers@pcl.com and include the position and location of interest.

Company: PCL Construction, Inc.

Primary Location: Tempe, Arizona

Job Title: Estimating Data Analyst

Requisition ID: 11754

policy_result.mobility_strategy: Focus on Canada's Global Skills Strategy and remote-first US companies with entities in Canada to bypass immediate H-1B lottery constraints. Prioritize employers with established O-1 or TN visa pathways for high-potential early-career talent.
priority_policy_themes: National AI investment and enterprise AI adoption
Cross-border digital trade and remote work labor mobility
constraints: Remote-friendly teams expand the opportunity set
opportunity_signals: Canadian immigration policy currently favors STEM graduates with data analytics and ML expertise.
US-based AI infrastructure firms are increasingly hiring remote-first to access global talent pools.
Demand for data analysts in disaster resilience and healthcare analytics aligns with your specific internship portfolio.
policy_result.explanation: Given the lack of current work authorization in the US, the path of least resistance is leveraging Canada's more accessible immigration framework while targeting US companies with remote-first policies. Your background in high-impact sectors like disaster analytics and biomedical research provides a strong narrative for 'extraordinary ability' or specialized skill-based visa petitions. By focusing on growth-oriented sectors like AI infrastructure, you align your profile with industries that are currently receiving significant government subsidies and investment, increasing the likelihood of sponsorship.

ranked_industries.name: Healthcare AI
ranked_industries.why_now: Incumbents are digitizing rapidly while AI-native specialists open new workflow wedges. Policy alignment is driven by massive healthcare digitization budgets and the adoption of AI-enabled clinical workflows.
ranked_industries.company_strategy_hint: Clinical AI platform companies and health-tech startups
ranked_industries.market_stage: High growth phase with significant venture and government backing for predictive clinical tools.
ranked_industries.trend_summary: Healthcare is shifting toward data-driven outcomes, creating high demand for analysts who can bridge clinical data and ML models.
entry_barriers: Requires domain-specific understanding of health data privacy (HIPAA)
High emphasis on portfolio proof of clinical data cleaning
ranked_industries.long_term_growth: Exceptional long-term stability due to the essential nature of the sector and the complexity of its data problems.
ranked_industries.personalized_reason: Your research experience in lung cancer analysis provides a direct, high-value narrative for this sector that differentiates you from generalist applicants.

ranked_industries.name: Climate and Energy Tech
ranked_industries.why_now: Policy support and massive infrastructure investment are expanding demand for data-heavy operations roles. This sector is a direct beneficiary of public-private climate investment.
ranked_industries.company_strategy_hint: Grid management and renewable energy analytics firms
ranked_industries.market_stage: Rapidly scaling as the energy transition requires complex optimization of decentralized power grids.
ranked_industries.trend_summary: Policy-driven investment is creating a surge in demand for technical talent capable of modeling energy consumption and grid performance.
entry_barriers: Niche domain knowledge of energy systems
Strong requirement for forecasting and time-series modeling proficiency
ranked_industries.long_term_growth: Strong, as global decarbonization efforts will require decades of data-driven infrastructure optimization.
ranked_industries.personalized_reason: Your background in disaster analytics and forecasting models aligns perfectly with the predictive modeling needs of grid management companies.

ranked_industries.name: Enterprise SaaS
ranked_industries.why_now: AI is reshaping product design and analytics ownership, creating a need for analysts who can build internal decision intelligence. Enterprise productivity demand remains a top priority for corporate spending.
ranked_industries.market_stage: Mature but undergoing a massive pivot toward embedding AI and predictive analytics into core product offerings.
ranked_industries.trend_summary: Companies are moving away from simple reporting toward automated, AI-driven insights for business users.
entry_barriers: High requirement for clean, scalable SQL and dashboarding skills
ranked_industries.long_term_growth: Highly stable with clear career ladders for data professionals moving into product analytics or data science.
ranked_industries.personalized_reason: Your internship experience building SQL dashboards and KPI reporting is directly applicable to the core operations of SaaS companies.

ranked_industries.name: Fintech
ranked_industries.why_now: The sector continues to reward companies that reduce friction, fraud, and manual finance work through automation. Policy alignment is strong in digital financial operations and trust infrastructure.
ranked_industries.market_stage: Consolidating around high-efficiency platforms that prioritize risk reduction and user growth.
ranked_industries.trend_summary: Fintech is increasingly reliant on real-time anomaly detection and predictive analytics to maintain trust and operational efficiency.
entry_barriers: Requires high-quality, bug-free code for financial data integrity
ranked_industries.long_term_growth: High, as financial systems move toward fully digital, automated infrastructure.
ranked_industries.personalized_reason: Your experience with anomaly detection in disaster analytics is a transferable skill for fraud detection and risk modeling in fintech.
